name: Family Favorite Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Non-nutritive sweetener (Sugar Twin is best for this)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream margarine and sweetener.
3. Sift baking powder, salt, flour, then add alternately with skim milk to the creamed mixture.
4. Add almond extract, and beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, and fold in.
5. Pour into 2 well-greased 9-inch layer pans.
6. Bake about 30 minutes.
7. Cool a few minutes, then remove from pans and cool further on wire racks.
8. Top with Creamy Frosting. Makes 1 two-layer cake.
